# To disable autogeneration for this file entirely, delete this header.        #

set(_LOOM_AMDGPU_ISA_XML_SOURCE_DIR
  "${PROJECT_BINARY_DIR}/_deps/amdgpu_isa_xml-src"
)
loom_low_descriptor_data_archive(
  NAME
    loom_amdgpu_isa_xml
  SOURCE_DIR
    "${_LOOM_AMDGPU_ISA_XML_SOURCE_DIR}"
  URLS
    "https://gpuopen.com/download/AMD_GPU_MR_ISA_XML_2026_03_05.zip"
  SHA256
    "1f17587abc9d0d355cf6f65bdba7496838b4e8313922769199689615c434965c"
)

iree_add_all_subdirs()

loom_generated_cc_library(
  NAME
    error_defs
  GENERATOR
    iree::runtime::py::loom::gen::c_errors
  SOURCE
    "error_catalog.c"
  GENERATED_HDR_FLAGS
    "--header"
  GENERATED_HDRS
    "error_catalog.h"
  ARGS
    "--catalog-symbol=loom_amdgpu_error_catalog"
    "--fallback-catalog-symbol=loom_error_catalog_core"
    "--fallback-public-header=loom/error/error_catalog.h"
    "--no-runtime"
    "--public-header=loom/target/arch/amdgpu/error_catalog.h"
    "--shard=amdgpu"
  DEPS
    loom::src::loom::error::error_defs
)

    ::wait_states
    iree::base
    iree::base::internal::arena
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::allocation
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::packet
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::schedule
  PUBLIC
)

loom_cc_library(
  NAME
    legalization
  HDRS
    "legalization.h"
  SRCS
    "legalization.c"
  DEPS
    iree::base
    loom::src::loom::ir
    loom::src::loom::ops::index
    loom::src::loom::ops::kernel
    loom::src::loom::ops::scalar
    loom::src::loom::ops::scf
    loom::src::loom::rewrite::rewriter
    loom::src::loom::target::arch::amdgpu::target_info_defs
    loom::src::loom::target::legalization
  PUBLIC
)

loom_cc_library(
  NAME
    provider
  HDRS
    "provider.h"
  SRCS
    "provider.c"
  DEPS
    ::legalization
    ::low_registry
    ::lower
    ::math_policy
    ::ops
    ::packet_diagnostics
    ::pass_registry
    iree::base
    loom::src::loom::pass::builder
    loom::src::loom::target::provider
  PUBLIC
)

loom_cc_test(
  NAME
    provider_test
  SRCS
    "provider_test.cc"
  DEPS
    ::provider
    iree::base
    iree::base::internal::arena
    loom::src::loom::ir
    loom::src::loom::ops::op_registry
    loom::src::loom::ops::pass
    loom::src::loom::pass::builder
    loom::src::loom::pass::registry
    loom::src::loom::pass::testing::registry_verify
    loom::src::loom::target::provider
    loom::src::loom::testing::module_ptr
    iree::testing::gtest
    iree::testing::gtest_main
)

loom_cc_library(
  NAME
    check_provider
  HDRS
    "check/occupancy.h"
    "check/provider.h"
  SRCS
    "check/occupancy.c"
    "check/provider.c"
  DEPS

    loom::src::loom::tools::loom-check::provider
  PUBLIC
)

  NAME
    hal_kernel_abi

)

)

iree_executable_test(
  NAME
    "source_low_subgroup_collective"
  ARGS
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/test/source_low/source_low_subgroup_collective.loom-test"
  SRC
    loom::src::loom::tools::loom-check
  LABELS
    "loom-check"
)

loom_cc_library(
  NAME
    wait_plan
  HDRS
    "wait_plan.h"
  SRCS
    "wait_plan.c"
  DEPS
    ::descriptor_semantics
    ::target_id
    ::target_refs
    iree::base
    iree::base::internal::arena
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::allocation
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::descriptors
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::packet
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::packet_hazard_plan
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::packet_hazard_plan_json
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::packet_progress
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::schedule
    loom::src::loom::ir
    loom::src::loom::ops::low
  PUBLIC
)

loom_cc_library(
  NAME
    wait_packets
  HDRS
    "wait_packets.h"
  SRCS
    "wait_packets.c"
  DEPS
    ::target_refs
    ::wait_plan
    iree::base
    iree::base::internal::arena
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::descriptors
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::function
    loom::src::loom::ir
    loom::src::loom::ops::low
    loom::src::loom::target::arch::amdgpu::target_info
    loom::src::loom::util::json
    loom::src::loom::util::stream
  PUBLIC
)

  NAME
    storage_lease

    "storage_lease.h"

  DEPS

    ::target_refs
    ::wait_plan

    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::storage_lease

)

    occupancy_tables

    ::target_info
    iree::base
)

  PUBLIC
)

  CC_LIBRARIES
    "low_registry"
)

  NAME
    matrix_contract_types

    "matrix_contract_types.h"
  DEPS
    ::target_info_defs
    ::target_refs
    iree::base
    loom::src::loom::analysis::contract_roles

  PUBLIC
)

  NAME
    matrix_contract_tables

    iree::runtime::py::loom::gen::amdgpu_matrix_contract_tables
  ARGS
    "--public-header=loom/target/arch/amdgpu/matrix_contract_tables.h"
  DEPS
    ::matrix_contract_types
    iree::base
)

    ::matrix_contract_projection
